resource_notes.change: The only change is the _moe_forward_kernel_all64 JIT pass config: TL_DISABLE_WARP_SPECIALIZED=True was changed to False. Kernel source, launch parameters, tiles, threads, pack factors, swizzles, loops, and math are unchanged.
resource_notes.small_correctness: H512/I512/experts4/valid568 compiled and allclosed with max_abs_error=3.0517578125e-05 and mean_abs_error=3.450765007073642e-07.
resource_notes.formal_correctness: Formal point 2 allclosed with max_abs_error=0.0009765625 and mean_abs_error=1.0882066817430314e-05.
resource_notes.test_protocol: Formal point 2 used warmup=10, iters=100, seed=81394 on server-64-1.
resource_notes.resources: Compilation succeeded with no OOM, shared-memory-limit, spill, or runtime-resource error reported. The only diagnostic was the pre-existing TileLang PDL warning for the MACA target.
resource_notes.early_stop: Formal point 2 regressed by 0.028233%, far below the required 2% improvement. The candidate was rejected immediately and no additional warp-specialization variants were explored.
